text:
There are only blue eggs.

There's a chicken who thinks there are different kinds. It decides to start asking friends.

One day, the chicken meets someone who says they've eaten indigo eggs. Indigo can make everything blue.

But it doesn't taste blue. It tastes greenish. So it doubts itself.

It meets someone else. Maybe it tastes blue?

This time it tastes like—

*Poof.*

Blue. Blue as a sea of indigo. 

Now it has a bag.

Inside are indigo eggs.

Now it's sure.

Every single thing is—

*Poof.*

Blue.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
